app.title: LigaMatch
app.subtitle: Create and manage football and futsal tournaments

hero.title: Organize tournaments with ease
hero.description: Complete platform to create, configure and manage football and futsal tournaments. Team registration, schedules, results and standings all in one place.

features.title: Everything you need
features.createDesc: Set up your tournament in minutes: format, dates and rules
features.scheduleDesc: Generate automatic schedules and avoid conflicts
features.resultsDesc: Update results and view the standings table

pricing.title: Plans and pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that best fits you

myTournaments.title: Tournaments I manage
myTournaments.empty: You don't manage any tournaments. Create one to get started.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.myTeamsDesc: Manage your team data, players and view statistics.
dashboard.myTournamentsDesc: Manage your tournaments, schedule and standings.
dashboard.teamsByTournamentDesc: List of teams in each tournament you manage.
dashboard.noTeamsMatchFilters: No teams or tournaments match your search or filters.
dashboard.emptyTeams: You have no teams. If an administrator invited you, check your email.
dashboard.noTournamentsMatchFilters: No tournaments match your search or filters.
dashboard.tournamentTypesCompareIntro: Below is a comparison of tournament categories and types, and how teams should be formed for each.

tournamentTypeTeams.none: No restrictions. Teams can be formed with any players; no age or category requirements.
tournamentTypeTeams.open: Open. Teams can be formed with any players; no age or category requirements.
tournamentTypeTeams.ages: By age. Tournament is divided by age categories (e.g. birth year ranges). Each player must be assigned to a category; teams must comply with the rules of their category.

dashboard.playersSectionDesc: List of players by tournament and team. Select a tournament and optionally a team to view players.
dashboard.playersSelectTournamentFirst: Select a tournament to view players.

create.title: Create tournament
create.error: Failed to create tournament. Please try again.
create.venuesRequiredDesc: If single venue is not selected, teams will be required to add an official playing venue and an alternate one.

standings.title: Standings
standings.empty: No teams yet. Register teams to see the standings.
standings.proOnlyReorder: Only with PRO can you manually reorder the standings table.

cardsByMatch.title: Yellow and red cards by match

detail.title: Tournament
detail.bgImageErrorMaxSize: Background image must not exceed 1 MB
detail.singleVenueDesc: Tournament is played at a single venue. Team venues are not required.
detail.suspendConfirm: Suspend this tournament? It will not appear in the public list.
detail.deleteConfirm: Delete this tournament? Teams, players and matches will also be deleted. This action cannot be undone.

report.title: Generate PDF report
report.description: Generate a report with match statistics, top scorers, cards and penalties in the selected date range.

matches.title: Match schedule
matches.generateDesc: Generate round-robin schedule. Each team plays against all others.
matches.noMatches: No matches yet. Generate the schedule when you have at least 2 teams.
matches.cannotDeleteRegenerateWithScores: You cannot delete or regenerate the schedule while there are matches with scores and the tournament has not ended (end date).
matches.addMatchDesc: Create a match manually between two teams.
matches.addMatchProOnly: Only with PRO can you add matches manually.
matches.teamsMustDiffer: Home and away teams must be different
matches.suspendedMatchRequired: Please select the suspended match when adding a rescheduled match
matches.suspendMatchWithResult: Cannot suspend a match with a recorded result
matches.deleteMatchConfirm: Delete this match? {{match}} Only manually added matches (administrative or rescheduled) can be deleted.
matches.validationGoalsMismatch: Total goals must match the number of goals added.
matches.validationCardsMismatch: Card count must match the cards added per team.

register.title: User registration
register.description: Create an account to continue creating your tournament.
register.recaptchaRequired: You must complete the reCAPTCHA verification
register.name: Name (optional)

login.title: Sign in
login.description: Sign in to create and manage tournaments.

forgotPassword.title: Recover password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.success: If an account exists for that email, you will receive a link to reset your password. Check your inbox.
forgotPassword.error: Failed to send. Please try again.

resetPassword.title: New password
resetPassword.description: Choose a new password for your account.
resetPassword.success: Password updated. You can now sign in.
resetPassword.error: Invalid or expired link. Please request a new one.

profile.title: My profile
profile.name: Name
profile.error: Failed to save. Please try again.
profile.changePasswordDesc: Use "Forgot your password?" on the sign-in screen to reset your password by email.
profile.participatingTournamentsDesc: Tournaments where you have at least one team registered.
profile.participatingEmpty: You're not in any tournament yet.

invite.registerDescription: You have been invited to manage the team {{team}} in {{tournament}}. Create your account to get access.

add.title: Add team
add.name: Team name
add.success: Team created. Invitation sent to owner.
add.noAvailableTeams: No teams available from other tournaments with the same sport.

createPage.title: Create team
createPage.description: Choose the tournament the team will participate in and fill in the details. The team will be registered in that tournament.
createPage.selectTournamentHelp: You can only create teams in tournaments you manage.
createPage.ageCategoriesInfo: This tournament has age categories. You can assign each player to a category when registering them.
createPage.noTournaments: You don't manage any tournaments. Create one first.
createPage.onlyTournamentAdminCanCreate: Only tournament administrators can register new teams. If an administrator invited you by email, the team was already created with your email.
createPage.invitedUserHelp: If a tournament administrator invited you by email, check your inbox (and spam) and use the invitation link to register or accept. The email must be the one you use as team owner.
createPage.onlyByInvite: Teams can only be created by a tournament administrator. If you were invited, use the link in the email to register.
createPage.firstTeamAligned: The first team must meet the selected tournament's requirements (sport, age categories if applicable).
createPage.success: Team created. Invitation sent to the owner.
createPage.error: Failed to create team. Please try again.

detail.title: Team
detail.birthDateInvalid: Invalid date. Check day, month and year (e.g. February 29 only in leap years).
detail.venuesDesc: Each team must have at least one official venue and one alternate. The official venue is used by default when generating the schedule.
detail.venuesDescSingleVenue: Optional when the tournament uses a single venue.
detail.noVenues: No venues yet. Add at least one official and one alternate.
detail.venueTypeHelp: Official = home venue used by default. Alternate = backup venue.
detail.addedToOtherTournamentWarning: This team was added to the tournament "{{name}}". You must adjust the team configuration (age categories, etc.) to meet that tournament's requirements.
detail.addedToOtherTournamentsWarning: This team was added to other tournaments with a different format (e.g. age categories). You must adjust the team configuration to meet each tournament's requirements.
detail.removePlayerConfirm: Unsubscribe this player from the team?
detail.playerRequestPending: Request sent to the tournament administrator for approval.
detail.categoriesInTournament: Assign each player to an age category for this tournament.
detail.addPlayerBirthYearOutOfCategory: Birth year must be between {{min}} and {{max}} for category "{{category}}".
detail.addPlayerBirthYearTooOld: Birth year cannot be before {{min}} for category "{{category}}".

rosterPdf.title: Team roster (PDF)
rosterPdf.description: Generate a PDF with tournament data, team category, and player list (photo, name, ID number, birth date, observations). Preview opens in a new tab.

detail.pendingChangesTooltip: There are player changes pending approval by the tournament administrator.

playerProfile.title: Player profile
playerProfile.changesRequireApproval: Changes must be approved by the tournament administrator.
playerProfile.pendingChangesBanner: You have changes pending approval by the tournament administrator.
playerProfile.resendNotificationSent: Notification sent to the tournament administrator.
playerProfile.editDisabledPending: You cannot edit while there are changes pending approval.

playerChangeRequests.title: Player change requests
playerChangeRequests.help: Player data is not updated until you approve or reject the request. Below you see the changes the team owner is requesting (current → requested) so you can decide.

messages.title: Messages
messages.copyToEmail: A copy is sent to the recipient's email.
messages.retentionLegend: Messages older than one month will no longer be available in the app. That is why a copy of the messages you send is sent to your email; keep those emails if you need the history.
messages.broadcastPlaceholder: Write the message for the teams...
messages.deleteConversationConfirm: Delete this conversation? All messages will be removed. This cannot be undone.
messages.noBroadcastsYet: You have not sent any messages to teams in this tournament yet.
messages.deleteBroadcastConfirm: Delete this message sent to teams? It will be removed from history; recipients already received it.
